General.Name: SKY Metals Ltd
General.Description: Sky Metals Limited engages in the exploration and development of mineral resources in Australia. The company explores for gold, copper, tin, tungsten, copper, bismuth, indium, nickel, silver, lead, and zinc deposits. The company was formerly known as Planet Gas Limited and changed its name to Sky Metals Limited in June 2019. Sky Metals Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Orange, Australia.
